TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Dana Barros sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1967, byacing te 4 ru 13 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Massachusetts, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 180 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 74 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1989 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Seattle SuperSonics. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing krahu' pqwasan piru na qyanux Dana Barros maki Boston krahu' pqwasan biru mzyu mari.2017 kawas 2 byacing 25 ryax,wal wayal mhngaw la. 2006 kawas Barros mtzyaw sinsiy nya maki Northeastern krahu' pqwasan biru.2006 kawas 6 byacing ini mtzyaw beh Northeastern pqwasan la.suruw lga,hiya mrhuw休閒總監 pincyogan nya maki Boston. hiya maki Celtics kosi mtzyaw. Barros wayal mhngaw la,gyahan Sports Complex maki Mansfield,Massachusetts . ana ga hiya kosi panga cingay alu,2006 kawas Barros pucing nya t'alax kosi' la.Barros NESN na squilq maki" NESN Daily"NBA na gbang 分析. masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *ana βarros~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa mas~ɕs~ɕaʦ~ʨħus~ɕetts~ɕ, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu s~ɕeattle s~ɕupers~ɕoniʦ~ʨs~ɕ. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan piru na qjanux *ana βarros~ɕ maki βos~ɕton kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru mzju mari.**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,wal wajal mħŋaw la. **** kawas~ɕ βarros~ɕ mtzjaw s~ɕins~ɕij nja maki nortħeas~ɕtern kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ini mtzjaw βeħ nortħeas~ɕtern pqwas~ɕan la.s~ɕuruw lɣa,ħija mrħuw**** pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja maki βos~ɕton. ħija maki ʦ~ʨeltiʦ~ʨs~ɕ kos~ɕi mtzjaw. βarros~ɕ wajal mħŋaw la,ɣjaħan s~ɕports~ɕ ʦ~ʨomplex maki mans~ɕ*iel*,mas~ɕs~ɕaʦ~ʨħus~ɕetts~ɕ . ana ɣa ħija kos~ɕi paŋa ʦ~ʨiŋaj alu,**** kawas~ɕ βarros~ɕ puʦ~ʨiŋ nja tʔalax kos~ɕiʔ la.βarros~ɕ nes~ɕn na s~ɕquilq maki" nes~ɕn *ailj"nβa na ɣβaŋ **. mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Dana Barros sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1967, byacing te 4 ru 13 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Massachusetts, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 180 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 74 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1989 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Seattle SuperSonics. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing krahu' pqwasan piru na qyanux Dana Barros maki Boston krahu' pqwasan biru mzyu mari.2017 kawas 2 byacing 25 ryax,wal wayal mhngaw la. 2006 kawas Barros mtzyaw sinsiy nya maki Northeastern krahu' pqwasan biru.2006 kawas 6 byacing ini mtzyaw beh Northeastern pqwasan la.suruw lga,hiya mrhuw休閒總監 pincyogan nya maki Boston. hiya maki Celtics kosi mtzyaw. Barros wayal mhngaw la,gyahan Sports Complex maki Mansfield,Massachusetts . ana ga hiya kosi panga cingay alu,2006 kawas Barros pucing nya t'alax kosi' la.Barros NESN na squilq maki" NESN Daily"NBA na gbang 分析. masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *ana βarros~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa mas~ɕs~ɕaʦ~ʨħus~ɕetts~ɕ, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu s~ɕeattle s~ɕupers~ɕoniʦ~ʨs~ɕ. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan piru na qjanux *ana βarros~ɕ maki βos~ɕton kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru mzju mari.**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,wal wajal mħŋaw la. **** kawas~ɕ βarros~ɕ mtzjaw s~ɕins~ɕij nja maki nortħeas~ɕtern kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ini mtzjaw βeħ nortħeas~ɕtern pqwas~ɕan la.s~ɕuruw lɣa,ħija mrħuw**** pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja maki βos~ɕton. ħija maki ʦ~ʨeltiʦ~ʨs~ɕ kos~ɕi mtzjaw. βarros~ɕ wajal mħŋaw la,ɣjaħan s~ɕports~ɕ ʦ~ʨomplex maki mans~ɕ*iel*,mas~ɕs~ɕaʦ~ʨħus~ɕetts~ɕ . ana ɣa ħija kos~ɕi paŋa ʦ~ʨiŋaj alu,**** kawas~ɕ βarros~ɕ puʦ~ʨiŋ nja tʔalax kos~ɕiʔ la.βarros~ɕ nes~ɕn na s~ɕquilq maki" nes~ɕn *ailj"nβa na ɣβaŋ **. mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
